<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ru">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Репетитор по китайскому языку</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Serif+SC:wght@300;400;700&family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=Cinzel:wght@400;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --teal:       #2a7a7a;
    --teal-dark:  #1a5555;
    --teal-light: #5bb5b5;
    --mist:       #e8f4f4;
    --cream:      #f7f2eb;
    --ink:        #1c2b2b;
    --gold:       #c8a84b;
    --gold-light: #e8cc80;
    --red-accent: #c0392b;
    --petal:      #e05050;
  }

  * { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
  body { background:#0e1f1f; color:var(--ink); font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; overflow-x:hidden; }

  /* ══════════ HERO ══════════ */
  #hero {
    min-height:100vh;
    position:relative;
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;
    overflow:hidden;
  }

  .hero-bg {
    position:absolute; inset:0;
    background-image: url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');
    background-size:cover;
    background-position:center;
    filter:saturate(0.9) brightness(0.88);
    z-index:0;
  }
  .hero-bg::after {
    content:'';
    position:absolute; inset:0;
    background: linear-gradient(
      180deg,
      rgba(10,10,10,0.45) 0%,
      rgba(10,10,10,0.2) 40%,
      rgba(10,10,10,0.65) 100%
    );
  }

  /* Top gold band */
  .band-top {
    position:absolute; top:0; left:0; right:0; height:6px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--teal-dark), var(--gold), var(--teal-light), var(--gold), var(--teal-dark));
    z-index:3;
  }
  .band-bottom {
    position:absolute; bottom:0; left:0; right:0; height:6px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--teal-dark), var(--gold), var(--teal-light), var(--gold), var(--teal-dark));
    z-index:3;
  }

  /* Corner ornaments */
  .orn {
    position:absolute; width:70px; height:70px; z-index:3; opacity:0.65;
  }
  .orn svg { width:100%; height:100%; }
  .orn.tl { top:14px; left:14px; }
  .orn.tr { top:14px; right:14px; transform:scaleX(-1); }
  .orn.bl { bottom:14px; left:14px; transform:scaleY(-1); }
  .orn.br { bottom:14px; right:14px; transform:scale(-1,-1); }

  /* Hero content */
  .hero-inner {
    position:relative; z-index:2;
    text-align:center;
    padding: 2rem 1.5rem;
    max-width:800px;
  }

  .hero-eyebrow {
    font-family:'Cinzel', serif;
    font-size:clamp(0.55rem,1.3vw,0.75rem);
    letter-spacing:0.6em;
    color:var(--gold-light);
    text-transform:uppercase;
    opacity:0;
    animation: fadeUp 1s 0.2s forwards;
    margin-bottom:1.2rem;
  }

  .hero-zh {
    font-family:'Noto Serif SC', serif;
    font-size:clamp(1.8rem,4vw,2.8rem);
    color:rgba(232,204,128,0.4);
    letter-spacing:0.4em;
    opacity:0;
    animation: fadeUp 1s 0.4s forwards;
    margin-bottom:0.8rem;
    font-weight:300;
  }

  .hero-title {
    font-family:'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size:clamp(2.2rem,6vw,4.2rem);
    font-weight:300;
    line-height:1.15;
    color:#ffffff;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
    opacity:0;
    animation: fadeUp 1s 0.6s forwards;
    margin-bottom:1.5rem;
    letter-spacing:0.05em;
  }
  .hero-title strong {
    font-weight:600;
    color:var(--gold-light);
  }

  .hero-divider {
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:1rem;
    justify-content:center;
    margin:0 auto 1.5rem;
    max-width:420px;
    opacity:0;
    animation: fadeUp 1s 0.9s forwards;
  }
  .hero-divider .hline { flex:1; height:1px; background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--gold),transparent); }
  .hero-divider .hdot { color:var(--gold); font-size:1rem; }

  .hero-stats {
    display:flex;
    justify-content:center;
    gap:clamp(1.5rem,5vw,4rem);
    opacity:0;
    animation: fadeUp 1s 1.1s forwards;
    margin-bottom:2.5rem;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
  }
  .stat-item {
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:0.2rem;
  }
  .stat-num {
    font-family:'Cinzel', serif;
    font-size:clamp(1.8rem,4vw,2.8rem);
    font-weight:600;
    color:var(--gold-light);
    line-height:1;
  }
  .stat-label {
    font-size:clamp(0.6rem,1.5vw,0.78rem);
    color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
    letter-spacing:0.2em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    font-family:'Cinzel', serif;
  }

  .hero-cta {
    opacity:0;
    animation: fadeUp 1s 1.3s forwards;
  }
  .btn-primary {
    display:inline-block;
    padding:0.85rem 2.8rem;
    background:transparent;
    border:1.5px solid var(--gold);
    color:var(--gold-light);
    font-family:'Cinzel', serif;
    font-size:0.72rem;
    letter-spacing:0.35em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    text-decoration:none;
    cursor:pointer;
    transition: background 0.4s, color 0.4s, box-shadow 0.4s;
    position:relative;
    overflow:hidden;
  }
  .btn-primary::before {
    content:'';
    position:absolute; inset:0;
    background:var(--gold);
    transform:translateX(-100%);
    transition:transform 0.4s ease;
    z-index:-1;
  }
  .btn-primary:hover { color:var(--ink); box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(200,168,75,0.4); }
  .btn-primary:hover::before { transform:translateX(0); }

  /* Scroll hint */
  .scroll-hint {
    position:absolute; bottom:2rem; left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%);
    z-index:3; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:0.4rem;
    opacity:0; animation: fadeUp 1s 1.8s forwards;
  }
  .scroll-hint span {
    font-family:'Cinzel',serif; font-size:0.55rem;
    letter-spacing:0.4em; color:rgba(232,204,128,0.6); text-transform:uppercase;
  }
  .s-arrow {
    width:20px; height:20px;
    border-right:1.5px solid var(--gold); border-bottom:1.5px solid var(--gold);
    transform:rotate(45deg);
    animation:bounce 1.6s ease-in-out infinite; opacity:0.6;
  }

  /* ══════════ CONTENT PAGE ══════════ */
  #content {
    position:relative;
    background:var(--cream);
    color:var(--ink);
    overflow:hidden;
  }



  #content-inner {
    position:relative;
    z-index:1;
  }

  /* Content header */
  .content-header {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--teal-dark) 0%, var(--teal) 100%);
    padding: 4rem 2rem 5rem;
    text-align:center;
    position:relative;
    overflow:hidden;
  }
  .content-header::before {
    content:'汉语';
    position:absolute; top:50%; left:50%; transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
    font-family:'Noto Serif SC',serif;
    font-size:clamp(8rem,20vw,14rem);
    color:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
    pointer-events:none;
    white-space:nowrap;
    letter-spacing:0.3em;
  }
  .content-header::after {
    content:'';
    position:absolute; bottom:-2px; left:0; right:0;
    height:40px;
    background:var(--cream);
    clip-path: ellipse(55% 100% at 50% 100%);
  }
  .ch-title-zh {
    font-family:'Noto Serif SC',serif;
    font-size:clamp(2rem,5vw,3.2rem);
    color:var(--gold-light);
    letter-spacing:0.3em;
    margin-bottom:0.5rem;
    position:relative;
  }
  .ch-title-ru {
    font-family:'Cinzel',serif;
    font-size:clamp(0.55rem,1.4vw,0.78rem);
    color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
    letter-spacing:0.5em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    position:relative;
  }

  /* Sections */
  .sections-wrap {
    max-width:1100px;
    margin:0 auto;
    padding:3rem 1.5rem 5rem;
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap:0;
  }

  /* ── Card styles ── */
  .reveal {
    opacity:0;
    transform:translateY(48px);
    transition: opacity 0.85s ease, transform 0.85s ease;
  }
  .reveal.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }

  /* Price section */
  .section-title {
    font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
    font-size:clamp(1.6rem,4vw,2.4rem);
    font-weight:300;
    color:var(--teal-dark);
    letter-spacing:0.05em;
    margin-bottom:0.3rem;
    position:relative;
    display:inline-block;
  }
  .section-title::after {
    content:'';
    display:block;
    width:60px; height:2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--gold), transparent);
    margin-top:0.4rem;
  }
  .section-zh {
    font-family:'Noto Serif SC',serif;
    font-size:clamp(0.8rem,2vw,1rem);
    color:var(--teal-light);
    letter-spacing:0.3em;
    margin-bottom:2rem;
    opacity:0.7;
  }

  .section-block {
    padding:3.5rem 0;
    border-bottom:1px solid rgba(42,122,122,0.12);
  }
  .section-block:last-child { border-bottom:none; }

  /* Price cards */
  .price-grid {
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px,1fr));
    gap:1.5rem;
    margin-top:2rem;
  }
  .price-card {
    background:white;
    border-radius:16px;
    padding:2rem 1.5rem;
    text-align:center;
    border:1px solid rgba(42,122,122,0.15);
    box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(42,122,122,0.06);
    position:relative;
    overflow:hidden;
    transition:transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
    cursor:default;
  }
  .price-card::before {
    content:'';
    position:absolute; top:0; left:0; right:0; height:4px;
    background:linear-gradient(90deg, var(--teal), var(--gold));
  }
  .price-card:hover {
    transform:translateY(-6px);
    box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(42,122,122,0.15);
  }
  .price-card.featured {
    background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--teal-dark), var(--teal));
    color:white;
    border-color:transparent;
  }
  .price-card.featured::before {
    background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--gold),var(--gold-light));
  }
  .price-badge {
    position:absolute; top:1rem; right:1rem;
    background:var(--gold);
    color:var(--ink);
    font-family:'Cinzel',serif;
    font-size:0.5rem;
    letter-spacing:0.2em;
    padding:0.2rem 0.5rem;
    border-radius:20px;
    text-transform:uppercase;
  }
  .price-type {
    font-family:'Cinzel',serif;
    font-size:0.65rem;
    letter-spacing:0.3em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--teal);
    margin-bottom:0.8rem;
  }
  .price-card.featured .price-type { color:var(--gold-light); }
  .price-amount {
    font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
    font-size:clamp(2rem,5vw,3rem);
    font-weight:600;
    color:var(--teal-dark);
    line-height:1;
    margin-bottom:0.2rem;
  }
  .price-card.featured .price-amount { color:var(--gold-light); }
  .price-per {
    font-size:0.8rem;
    color:#888;
    margin-bottom:1.2rem;
  }
  .price-card.featured .price-per { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6); }
  .price-features {
    list-style:none;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:0.5rem;
    text-align:left;
  }
  .price-features li {
    font-size:0.88rem;
    color:#555;
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.5rem;
  }
  .price-card.featured .price-features li { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8); }
  .price-features li::before {
    content:'✦';
    color:var(--gold);
    font-size:0.55rem;
    flex-shrink:0;
  }
  .price-card.featured .price-features li::before { color:var(--gold-light); }

  /* Bio section */
  .bio-grid {
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1fr 2fr;
    gap:3rem;
    align-items:start;
    margin-top:2rem;
  }
  @media(max-width:640px) { .bio-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; } }

  .bio-avatar {
    background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--teal-dark), var(--teal));
    border-radius:20px;
    aspect-ratio:1;
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;
    gap:0.5rem;
    box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(42,122,122,0.2);
    position:relative;
    overflow:hidden;
  }
  .bio-avatar::before {
    content:'白';
    font-family:'Noto Serif SC',serif;
    font-size:8rem;
    color:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    position:absolute;
    line-height:1;
  }
  .bio-avatar-zh {
    font-family:'Noto Serif SC',serif;
    font-size:3.5rem;
    color:var(--gold-light);
    position:relative;
    z-index:1;
    text-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(200,168,75,0.4);
  }
  .bio-avatar-name {
    font-family:'Cinzel',serif;
    font-size:0.65rem;
    letter-spacing:0.3em;
    color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
    text-transform:uppercase;
    position:relative;
    z-index:1;
  }

  .bio-text h3 {
    font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
    font-size:clamp(1.3rem,3vw,1.9rem);
    font-weight:400;
    color:var(--teal-dark);
    margin-bottom:1rem;
    font-style:italic;
  }
  .bio-text p {
    font-size:clamp(0.92rem,2vw,1.05rem);
    line-height:1.8;
    color:#444;
    margin-bottom:1rem;
  }
  .bio-tags {
    display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.5rem; margin-top:1.2rem;
  }
  .bio-tag {
    background:rgba(42,122,122,0.08);
    border:1px solid rgba(42,122,122,0.2);
    color:var(--teal-dark);
    padding:0.3rem 0.9rem;
    border-radius:20px;
    font-size:0.78rem;
    font-family:'Cinzel',serif;
    letter-spacing:0.1em;
    transition:background 0.2s;
  }
  .bio-tag:hover { background:rgba(42,122,122,0.16); }

  /* Why choose me */
  .why-grid {
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(200px,1fr));
    gap:1.2rem;
    margin-top:2rem;
  }
  .why-card {
    background:white;
    border-radius:14px;
    padding:1.8rem 1.4rem;
    border:1px solid rgba(42,122,122,0.12);
    box-shadow:0 2px 16px rgba(42,122,122,0.05);
    transition:transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
    cursor:default;
  }
  .why-card:hover {
    transform:translateY(-4px);
    box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(42,122,122,0.12);
  }
  .why-icon {
    font-family:'Noto Serif SC',serif;
    font-size:2rem;
    color:var(--teal);
    margin-bottom:0.7rem;
    display:block;
  }
  .why-card h4 {
    font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
    font-size:1.1rem;
    font-weight:600;
    color:var(--teal-dark);
    margin-bottom:0.4rem;
  }
  .why-card p {
    font-size:0.85rem;
    line-height:1.6;
    color:#666;
  }

  /* Results timeline */
  .timeline {
    margin-top:2rem;
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap:0;
    position:relative;
  }
  .timeline::before {
    content:'';
    position:absolute;
    left:24px; top:0; bottom:0;
    width:2px;
    background:linear-gradient(180deg, var(--teal), var(--gold), var(--teal-dark));
    border-radius:2px;
  }
  .tl-item {
    display:flex;
    gap:1.5rem;
    padding:0 0 2rem 0;
    align-items:flex-start;
  }
  .tl-dot {
    width:50px; height:50px; flex-shrink:0;
    background:white;
    border:2px solid var(--teal);
    border-radius:50%;
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    font-family:'Cinzel',serif;
    font-size:0.6rem;
    color:var(--teal-dark);
    letter-spacing:0.05em;
    text-align:center;
    line-height:1.3;
    box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(42,122,122,0.15);
    position:relative; z-index:1;
    transition:background 0.3s, color 0.3s;
  }
  .tl-dot:hover { background:var(--teal); color:white; }
  .tl-body {
    background:white;
    border-radius:12px;
    padding:1.2rem 1.5rem;
    border:1px solid rgba(42,122,122,0.12);
    box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(42,122,122,0.05);
    flex:1;
  }
  .tl-body h4 {
    font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
    font-size:1.1rem;
    font-weight:600;
    color:var(--teal-dark);
    margin-bottom:0.3rem;
  }
  .tl-body p { font-size:0.87rem; line-height:1.6; color:#555; }

  /* Footer */
  .content-footer {
    background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--teal-dark), #0e2020);
    text-align:center;
    padding:3rem 2rem;
    position:relative;
    overflow:hidden;
  }
  .content-footer::before {
    content:'缘';
    font-family:'Noto Serif SC',serif;
    font-size:12rem;
    color:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
    position:absolute; top:50%; left:50%;
    transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
    pointer-events:none;
  }
  .footer-zh {
    font-family:'Noto Serif SC',serif;
    font-size:1.5rem;
    color:var(--gold-light);
    letter-spacing:0.5em;
    margin-bottom:0.5rem;
    position:relative;
  }
  .footer-text {
    font-family:'Cinzel',serif;
    font-size:0.6rem;
    letter-spacing:0.4em;
    color:rgba(232,204,128,0.4);
    text-transform:uppercase;
    position:relative;
  }
  .footer-contact {
    margin-top:1.5rem;
    position:relative;
  }
  .footer-contact a {
    display:inline-block;
    padding:0.7rem 2rem;
    border:1px solid var(--gold);
    color:var(--gold-light);
    font-family:'Cinzel',serif;
    font-size:0.65rem;
    letter-spacing:0.3em;
    text-decoration:none;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    transition:background 0.3s, color 0.3s;
  }
  .footer-contact a:hover {
    background:var(--gold);
    color:var(--ink);
  }



  /* ── Keyframes ── */
  @keyframes fadeUp {
    from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(30px); }
    to   { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }
  }
  @keyframes bounce {
    0%,100% { transform:rotate(45deg) translateY(0); }
    50%      { transform:rotate(45deg) translateY(6px); }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ══════ HERO ══════ -->
<section id="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="band-top"></div>

  <!-- Corner ornaments -->
  <div class="orn tl"><svg viewBox="0 0 70 70" fill="none"><path d="M5 5L38 5Q48 5 48 15L48 28" stroke="#c8a84b" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/><path d="M5 5L5 38Q5 48 15 48L28 48" stroke="#c8a84b" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/><circle cx="5" cy="5" r="3" fill="#c8a84b"/><rect x="18" y="18" width="7" height="7" stroke="#c8a84b" stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" transform="rotate(45 21.5 21.5)"/></svg></div>
  <div class="orn tr"><svg viewBox="0 0 70 70" fill="none"><path d="M5 5L38 5Q48 5 48 15L48 28" stroke="#c8a84b" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/><path d="M5 5L5 38Q5 48 15 48L28 48" stroke="#c8a84b" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/><circle cx="5" cy="5" r="3" fill="#c8a84b"/><rect x="18" y="18" width="7" height="7" stroke="#c8a84b" stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" transform="rotate(45 21.5 21.5)"/></svg></div>
  <div class="orn bl"><svg viewBox="0 0 70 70" fill="none"><path d="M5 5L38 5Q48 5 48 15L48 28" stroke="#c8a84b" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/><path d="M5 5L5 38Q5 48 15 48L28 48" stroke="#c8a84b" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/><circle cx="5" cy="5" r="3" fill="#c8a84b"/><rect x="18" y="18" width="7" height="7" stroke="#c8a84b" stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" transform="rotate(45 21.5 21.5)"/></svg></div>
  <div class="orn br"><svg viewBox="0 0 70 70" fill="none"><path d="M5 5L38 5Q48 5 48 15L48 28" stroke="#c8a84b" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/><path d="M5 5L5 38Q5 48 15 48L28 48" stroke="#c8a84b" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/><circle cx="5" cy="5" r="3" fill="#c8a84b"/><rect x="18" y="18" width="7" height="7" stroke="#c8a84b" stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" transform="rotate(45 21.5 21.5)"/></svg></div>

  <div class="hero-inner">
    <p class="hero-eyebrow">Профессиональное обучение · 专业教学</p>
    <p class="hero-zh">汉语教师</p>
    <h1 class="hero-title">Репетитор по<br><strong>китайскому языку</strong></h1>

    <div class="hero-divider">
      <div class="hline"></div>
      <div class="hdot">❖</div>
      <div class="hline"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="hero-stats">
      <div class="stat-item">
        <div class="stat-num">8+</div>
        <div class="stat-label">лет стажа</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-item">
        <div class="stat-num">200+</div>
        <div class="stat-label">учеников</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-item">
        <div class="stat-num">HSK 6</div>
        <div class="stat-label">уровень</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-item">
        <div class="stat-num">95%</div>
        <div class="stat-label">сдают экзамен</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="hero-cta">
      <a href="#content" class="btn-primary">Узнать подробнее</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="scroll-hint">
    <span>Прокрутите вниз</span>
    <div class="s-arrow"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="band-bottom"></div>
</section>

<!-- ══════ CONTENT ══════ -->
<section id="content">
  <!-- petals removed from content page -->

  <div id="content-inner">
    <div class="content-header">
      <div class="ch-title-zh">学习汉语</div>
      <div class="ch-title-ru">Всё что нужно знать</div>
    </div>

    <div class="sections-wrap">

      <!-- ── СТОИМОСТЬ ── -->
      <div class="section-block reveal">
        <div class="section-title">Стоимость занятий</div>
        <div class="section-zh">价格 · Цены</div>
        <div class="price-grid">
          <div class="price-card">
            <div class="price-type">Разовый урок</div>
            <div class="price-amount">1 200 ₽</div>
            <div class="price-per">60 минут</div>
            <ul class="price-features">
              <li>Индивидуальный подход</li>
              <li>Домашнее задание</li>
              <li>Материалы включены</li>
            </ul>
          </div>

          <div class="price-card featured">
            <div class="price-badge">Выгодно</div>
            <div class="price-type">Пакет 8 уроков</div>
            <div class="price-amount">8 500 ₽</div>
            <div class="price-per">~1 063 ₽ за урок</div>
            <ul class="price-features">
              <li>Экономия 1 100 ₽</li>
              <li>Индивидуальный план</li>
              <li>Поддержка в мессенджере</li>
              <li>Материалы включены</li>
            </ul>
          </div>

          <div class="price-card">
            <div class="price-type">Пакет 20 уроков</div>
            <div class="price-amount">19 000 ₽</div>
            <div class="price-per">~950 ₽ за урок</div>
            <ul class="price-features">
              <li>Максимальная экономия</li>
              <li>Расписание под вас</li>
              <li>Пробный тест HSK</li>
              <li>Поддержка 24/7</li>
            </ul>
          </div>

          <div class="price-card">
            <div class="price-type">Онлайн (Zoom / TG)</div>
            <div class="price-amount">1 000 ₽</div>
            <div class="price-per">60 минут</div>
            <ul class="price-features">
              <li>Из любой точки мира</li>
              <li>Запись урока</li>
              <li>Материалы в чат</li>
            </ul>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ── БИОГРАФИЯ ── -->
      <div class="section-block reveal" style="transition-delay:0.1s">
        <div class="section-title">Биография</div>
        <div class="section-zh">简介 · О себе</div>
        <div class="bio-grid">
          <div class="bio-avatar">
            <div class="bio-avatar-zh">白野</div>
            <div class="bio-avatar-name">白野 · Преподаватель</div>
          </div>
          <div class="bio-text">
            <h3>白野 — ваш проводник в мир китайского языка</h3>
            <p>Окончила МГИМО по специальности «Востоковедение» и продолжила обучение в Пекинском университете (北京大学) по программе для иностранных студентов. Прожила в Китае 4 года, свободно владею мандаринским диалектом и понимаю кантонский.</p>
            <p>С 2017 года занимаюсь преподаванием: сначала в языковом центре, затем перешла к индивидуальным занятиям. За это время подготовила более 200 студентов — от школьников до деловых людей, выезжающих на переговоры в Шанхай.</p>
            <p>Имею сертификат HSK 6 (高级), прошла курс педагогической подготовки CTCSOL и ежегодно повышаю квалификацию в онлайн-программах Hanban.</p>
            <div class="bio-tags">
              <span class="bio-tag">HSK 6</span>
              <span class="bio-tag">МГИМО</span>
              <span class="bio-tag">北京大学</span>
              <span class="bio-tag">CTCSOL</span>
              <span class="bio-tag">8 лет опыта</span>
              <span class="bio-tag">200+ учеников</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ── ПОЧЕМУ Я ── -->
      <div class="section-block reveal" style="transition-delay:0.15s">
        <div class="section-title">Почему стоит выбрать меня</div>
        <div class="section-zh">为什么选择我 · Мои преимущества</div>
        <div class="why-grid">
          <div class="why-card">
            <span class="why-icon">方</span>
            <h4>Авторская методика</h4>
            <p>Собственная система карточек, мнемоники и ритмического запоминания тонов — иероглифы запоминаются в 3 раза быстрее.</p>
          </div>
          <div class="why-card">
            <span class="why-icon">心</span>
            <h4>Индивидуальный подход</h4>
            <p>Каждый урок строится под вашу цель: туризм, бизнес, экзамен HSK или просто интерес к культуре.</p>
          </div>
          <div class="why-card">
            <span class="why-icon">语</span>
            <h4>Живой язык</h4>
            <p>Учим не «учебный» китайский, а тот, на котором говорят сегодня в Пекине, Шанхае и WeChat.</p>
          </div>
          <div class="why-card">
            <span class="why-icon">快</span>
            <h4>Быстрый результат</h4>
            <p>Первые диалоги — уже на 3-м уроке. Базовый уровень для путешествий — за 2 месяца.</p>
          </div>
          <div class="why-card">
            <span class="why-icon">书</span>
            <h4>Все материалы включены</h4>
            <p>Учебники, аудио, флэш-карточки в Anki, разборы иероглифов — всё предоставляется бесплатно.</p>
          </div>
          <div class="why-card">
            <span class="why-icon">時</span>
            <h4>Гибкий график</h4>
            <p>Занятия утром, вечером и в выходные. Онлайн или очно в Москве (м. Таганская).</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ── ЧЕМУ НАУЧУ ── -->
      <div class="section-block reveal" style="transition-delay:0.2s">
        <div class="section-title">Чему я научу и как быстро</div>
        <div class="section-zh">学习路线 · Программа обучения</div>
        <div class="timeline">
          <div class="tl-item">
            <div class="tl-dot">1–3<br>урока</div>
            <div class="tl-body">
              <h4>Фонетика и тоны</h4>
              <p>Пиньинь, 4 тона, основные приветствия и фразы вежливости. Вы уже сможете поздороваться, представиться и спросить дорогу.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="tl-item">
            <div class="tl-dot">1–2<br>месяца</div>
            <div class="tl-body">
              <h4>Базовый уровень (HSK 1–2)</h4>
              <p>150 иероглифов, базовые грамматические конструкции, числа, время, еда, покупки. Уровень уверенного туриста.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="tl-item">
            <div class="tl-dot">3–5<br>месяцев</div>
            <div class="tl-body">
              <h4>Средний уровень (HSK 3–4)</h4>
              <p>600 иероглифов, связная речь, деловая переписка, понимание несложных текстов и подкастов. Сдача HSK 3.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="tl-item">
            <div class="tl-dot">6–12<br>месяцев</div>
            <div class="tl-body">
              <h4>Продвинутый уровень (HSK 5–6)</h4>
              <p>2 500+ иероглифов, свободная беседа, просмотр фильмов без субтитров, деловые переговоры. Международно признанный сертификат.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div><!-- /sections-wrap -->

    <div class="content-footer">
      <div class="footer-zh">开始学习吧</div>
      <div class="footer-text">Начнём ваш путь к китайскому языку</div>
      <div class="footer-contact">
        <a href="https://t.me/yourhandle">Написать в Telegram</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<script>
/* ── Scroll reveal ── */
const revealEls = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
const revObs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => { if(e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('visible'); });
}, { threshold: 0.12 });
revealEls.forEach(el => revObs.observe(el));

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   HERO CANVAS — falling petals from left side
   (matching the plum tree in top-left corner)
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
const heroCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
heroCanvas.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:2;';
document.getElementById('hero').appendChild(heroCanvas);
const hCtx = heroCanvas.getContext('2d');

function resizeHero() {
  heroCanvas.width  = document.getElementById('hero').offsetWidth;
  heroCanvas.height = document.getElementById('hero').offsetHeight;
}
resizeHero();
window.addEventListener('resize', resizeHero);

class HeroPetal {
  constructor(initial) { this.init(initial); }
  init(initial) {
    // spawn from left 30% of screen (near the tree)
    this.x = Math.random() * heroCanvas.width * 0.42;
    this.y = initial
      ? Math.random() * heroCanvas.height
      : -15 + Math.random() * (heroCanvas.height * 0.5);
    this.size   = 5 + Math.random() * 9;
    this.speedX = 0.4 + Math.random() * 1.1;   // drift rightward
    this.speedY = 0.7 + Math.random() * 1.3;   // fall downward
    this.rot    = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
    this.rotSpd = -0.03 + Math.random() * 0.06;
    this.alpha  = 0.55 + Math.random() * 0.4;
    this.sway   = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
    this.swaySpd= 0.012 + Math.random() * 0.018;
    this.swayAmt= 0.3 + Math.random() * 0.7;
    // petal colour: mix of deep red and soft pink
    const hue = 350 + Math.random() * 15;
    const sat = 65 + Math.random() * 20;
    const lit = 50 + Math.random() * 15;
    this.color = `hsl(${hue},${sat}%,${lit}%)`;
  }
  draw() {
    hCtx.save();
    hCtx.translate(this.x, this.y);
    hCtx.rotate(this.rot);
    hCtx.globalAlpha = this.alpha;
    hCtx.fillStyle   = this.color;
    // teardrop / petal shape
    hCtx.beginPath();
    hCtx.moveTo(0, -this.size);
    hCtx.bezierCurveTo( this.size*0.9,  -this.size*0.5,
                         this.size*0.9,   this.size*0.5,
                         0,               this.size*0.3);
    hCtx.bezierCurveTo(-this.size*0.9,   this.size*0.5,
                        -this.size*0.9,  -this.size*0.5,
                         0,              -this.size);
    hCtx.fill();
    hCtx.restore();
  }
  update() {
    this.sway += this.swaySpd;
    this.x += this.speedX + Math.sin(this.sway) * this.swayAmt;
    this.y += this.speedY;
    this.rot += this.rotSpd;
    if (this.y > heroCanvas.height + 20 || this.x > heroCanvas.width + 20) {
      this.init(false);
    }
  }
}

const heroPetals = Array.from({length: 50}, (_, i) => new HeroPetal(true));

function animateHero() {
  hCtx.clearRect(0, 0, heroCanvas.width, heroCanvas.height);
  heroPetals.forEach(p => { p.update(); p.draw(); });
  requestAnimationFrame(animateHero);
}
animateHero();


/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   CONTENT PAGE — kanji flying from all 360°
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
const kCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
kCanvas.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:50;opacity:0;transition:opacity 1.2s;';
document.body.appendChild(kCanvas);
const kCtx = kCanvas.getContext('2d');

function resizeKanji() {
  kCanvas.width  = window.innerWidth;
  kCanvas.height = window.innerHeight;
}
resizeKanji();
window.addEventListener('resize', resizeKanji);

const KANJI_CHARS = ['学','文','字','语','书','中','国','汉','人','山','水','月','日','火','木','金','土','心','手','目','口','耳','力','王','天','地','风','云','龙','花','年','生','大','小','美','明','好','时','道','思'];

class KanjiParticle {
  constructor() { this.spawn(); }
  spawn() {
    // random edge: 0=top,1=right,2=bottom,3=left
    const edge = Math.floor(Math.random() * 4);
    const W = kCanvas.width, H = kCanvas.height;
    const cx = W / 2, cy = H / 2;

    if (edge === 0)      { this.x = Math.random() * W; this.y = -30; }
    else if (edge === 1) { this.x = W + 30;  this.y = Math.random() * H; }
    else if (edge === 2) { this.x = Math.random() * W; this.y = H + 30; }
    else                 { this.x = -30;     this.y = Math.random() * H; }

    // fly toward center with slight offset
    const tx = cx + (-120 + Math.random() * 240);
    const ty = cy + (-120 + Math.random() * 240);
    const dx = tx - this.x, dy = ty - this.y;
    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy);
    const speed = 0.5 + Math.random() * 1.0;
    this.vx = (dx / dist) * speed;
    this.vy = (dy / dist) * speed;

    this.char   = KANJI_CHARS[Math.floor(Math.random() * KANJI_CHARS.length)];
    this.size   = 14 + Math.random() * 22;
    this.alpha  = 0;
    this.targetAlpha = 0.12 + Math.random() * 0.22;
    this.rot    = -0.3 + Math.random() * 0.6;
    this.rotSpd = -0.008 + Math.random() * 0.016;
    this.life   = 0;
    this.maxLife= 180 + Math.random() * 120;
    // teal/gold palette
    const palette = ['#2a7a7a','#5bb5b5','#c8a84b','#e8cc80','#1a5555'];
    this.color = palette[Math.floor(Math.random() * palette.length)];
  }
  draw() {
    kCtx.save();
    kCtx.translate(this.x, this.y);
    kCtx.rotate(this.rot);
    kCtx.globalAlpha = this.alpha;
    kCtx.fillStyle   = this.color;
    kCtx.font        = `${this.size}px 'Noto Serif SC', serif`;
    kCtx.textAlign   = 'center';
    kCtx.textBaseline= 'middle';
    kCtx.fillText(this.char, 0, 0);
    kCtx.restore();
  }
  update() {
    this.x += this.vx;
    this.y += this.vy;
    this.rot += this.rotSpd;
    this.life++;
    // fade in
    if (this.life < 30) this.alpha = (this.life / 30) * this.targetAlpha;
    // fade out in last 40 frames
    else if (this.life > this.maxLife - 40)
      this.alpha = ((this.maxLife - this.life) / 40) * this.targetAlpha;
    if (this.life >= this.maxLife) this.spawn();
  }
}

const kanjiParticles = Array.from({length: 60}, () => {
  const k = new KanjiParticle();
  k.life = Math.floor(Math.random() * k.maxLife); // stagger starts
  return k;
});

let kanjiActive = false;

function animateKanji() {
  if (!kanjiActive) return;
  kCtx.clearRect(0, 0, kCanvas.width, kCanvas.height);
  kanjiParticles.forEach(p => { p.update(); p.draw(); });
  requestAnimationFrame(animateKanji);
}

const contentSec = document.getElementById('content');
const kObs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => {
    if (e.isIntersecting && !kanjiActive) {
      kanjiActive = true;
      kCanvas.style.opacity = '1';
      animateKanji();
    }
    if (!e.isIntersecting) {
      kanjiActive = false;
      kCanvas.style.opacity = '0';
      kCtx.clearRect(0, 0, kCanvas.width, kCanvas.height);
    }
  });
}, { threshold: 0.04 });
kObs.observe(contentSec);

/* ── Smooth anchor scroll ── */
document.querySelector('.btn-primary').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  document.getElementById('content').scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
});

/* ── Price card hover glow ── */
document.querySelectorAll('.price-card, .why-card').forEach(card => {
  card.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
    const rect = this.getBoundingClientRect();
    const x = ((e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width * 100).toFixed(1);
    const y = ((e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height * 100).toFixed(1);
    this.style.background = `radial-gradient(circle at ${x}% ${y}%, rgba(42,122,122,0.06), white)`;
  });
  card.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() {
    this.style.background = '';
  });
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
